title: Watch: Video shows huge blaze after blasts hit oil tankers off Iraq’s Basra coast
summary_full: A deadly explosion rocked two oil tankers in the Persian Gulf off Iraq's Basra coast, with officials suspecting an attack by Iranian boats. The blasts ignited massive fires, forcing the evacuation of 38 foreign crew members. This incident escalates regional tensions and threatens vital global oil supply routes, particularly the Strait of Hormuz.
